name: Fly Control
pestsCovered: House Fly, Fruit Fly, Drain Fly, Blow Fly
serviceDescription:
Control of houseflies and flying insects in kitchens, food areas, garbage zones, and commercial spaces.

Service Coverage:

Installation of Insect Light Traps (ILT) at strategic locations
Residual spray treatment in fly resting areas
Application of fly bait granules near breeding sources
Treatment of garbage areas and waste collection points
Spray treatment around doors, windows, and entry points
Drain treatment to eliminate breeding sites

Recommendations: Maintain proper waste management, cover food items, install air curtains at entry points

Installation of tamper-resistant bait stations at strategic locations

Sealing of entry points with steel wool and sealant
Treatment of burrows and nesting areas
Installation of door sweeps and gap sealing recommendations

name: Silverfish Control
treatmentMethod: Targeted treatment to control silverfish infestation in cupboards, bookshelves, wardrobes, and storage areas.
serviceDescription:
Service Coverage:

Inspection of books, papers, and storage areas
Treatment of bookshelves, cupboards, and wardrobes
Dust application in cracks, crevices, and wall voids
Treatment of bathroom and kitchen areas
Application of residual spray along baseboards
Treatment of attic and basement storage areas
Target Areas: Libraries, document storage, wardrobes, bathrooms

Prevention Tips:

Reduce humidity with proper ventilation
Store books and papers in sealed containers
Regular cleaning of storage areas
